title: Taxi Ride
opening: Alright, where are we headed today?

t1.prompt: Alright, where are we headed today?
t1.promptTranslation: Alright, where are we headed today?

t2.prompt: The airport, got it. Which terminal are you flying from?
t2.promptTranslation: The airport, got it. Which terminal are you flying from?

t2_details.prompt: No problem. To give you an accurate estimate, could you tell me your destination?
t2_details.promptTranslation: No problem. To give you an accurate estimate, could you tell me your destination?

t3_route_fare.prompt: Right, traffic's a bit heavy today, but I know a shortcut that usually shaves off a good ten minutes. The fare will likely be around £35-40 to your destination. Does that sound alright, and how will you be paying?
t3_route_fare.promptTranslation: Right, traffic's a bit heavy today, but I know a shortcut that usually shaves off a good ten minutes. The fare will likely be around £35-40 to your destination. Does that sound alright, and how will you be paying?

t4_clarify.prompt: The shortcut avoids the city center congestion, saving about ten minutes. The fare is usually consistent unless traffic is unusually bad, but I can't give an exact fixed price. So, cash or card then?
t4_clarify.promptTranslation: The shortcut avoids the city center congestion, saving about ten minutes. The fare is usually consistent unless traffic is unusually bad, but I can't give an exact fixed price. So, cash or card then?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat what you said?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat what you said?

t-end.prompt: Excellent. We'll be there shortly. Have a good trip!
t-end.promptTranslation: Excellent. We'll be there shortly. Have a good trip!
